name: stemma
description: Structure-aware Microsoft Word (.docx) editing with tracked changes, for agents.
long_description: Stemma opens a .docx into a typed intermediate representation, lets an agent read its outline/text/markdown, apply tracked-change edits (insert, delete, replace, formatting, comments, images, table ops), validate the result against OOXML, and save — all as real Word tracked changes that open clean and accept/reject correctly. Malformed input or unsupported edits fail loudly rather than silently corrupting the document.

tools.name: open_docx
tools.description: Open a .docx from a path into an in-memory document handle.

tools.name: save_docx
tools.description: Save the document (with tracked changes) to a .docx path.

tools.name: compare_docx
tools.description: Produce a tracked-change redline between two documents.

tools.name: read_outline
tools.description: Block-level outline with per-block tracked-change status.

tools.name: read_index
tools.description: Stable block index for addressing edits.

tools.name: read_text
tools.description: Plain text of the document or a block.

tools.name: read_markdown
tools.description: Markdown projection of the document.

tools.name: read_html
tools.description: HTML projection of the document.

tools.name: read_block
tools.description: Read a single block by id.

tools.name: read_window
tools.description: Read a contiguous window of blocks.

tools.name: get_section
tools.description: Read a section of the document.

tools.name: read_styles
tools.description: Read the document's style table (doc defaults + per-style rows, un-resolved).

tools.name: find
tools.description: Find text occurrences with their block locations.

tools.name: read_redline
tools.description: Read the document's tracked-change markup.

tools.name: read_accepted
tools.description: Read the document as if all changes were accepted.

tools.name: read_rejected
tools.description: Read the document as if all changes were rejected.

tools.name: list_revisions
tools.description: List pending tracked changes as structured rows (id, kind, author, text, date).

tools.name: check_edit
tools.description: Dry-run an edit transaction and report what it would do.

tools.name: apply_edit
tools.description: Apply a tracked-change edit transaction.

tools.name: apply_batch
tools.description: Apply a batch of edit transactions.

tools.name: replace_text
tools.description: Tracked replace of one phrase, matched server-side over body text.

tools.name: replace_text_batch
tools.description: Apply a list of tracked text replacements with per-item outcomes.

tools.name: replace_all
tools.description: Replace all occurrences of text as tracked changes.

tools.name: accept_changes
tools.description: Accept tracked changes (all or selected).

tools.name: reject_changes
tools.description: Reject tracked changes (all or selected).

tools.name: validate_docx
tools.description: Validate the serialized document against OOXML, reporting issues.

tools.name: review_session
tools.description: Everything this session changed since open_docx: change census, any untracked delta, an untouched-blocks proof, and the validator verdict.

tools.name: audit_docx
tools.description: The same change census, untouched-blocks proof, and validator verdict for any two .docx files, computed statelessly.
